name: Fortune Cookies-2
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fortunes on small strips of paper and set aside.
2. Mix together the ingredients and beat thoroughly to make a batter.
3. Place a heaping tablespoon of batter onto a medium-hot griddle (same temperature as for pancakes). Use a spoon to spread out the batter to keep the cookie from being too thick or small.
4. Turn the cookie after a couple of minutes to brown the second side.
5. Remove the cookie from the griddle and set it on a table.
6. While the cookie is still hot, place a fortune in the middle and bring the two opposite sides of the cookie up. Then bring the other two ends downward together to fold in half.
7. Once the cookie has cooled, it will no longer be possible to fold them. It takes some practice and patience for handling cookies that are hot off the griddle.
